title: Pre-Market Brief — 17 Jun 2026
intro: Futures diverge as tech weakens ahead of Fed decision while financials rally, creating sector rotation into value.

sections.heading: 🌅 SNAPSHOT
sections.content: Futures diverge as tech weakens ahead of Fed decision while financials rally, creating sector rotation into value.

sections.heading: 📊 FUTURES
sections.content:
S&P 500 Futures: $750.33 (-0.60%) holding above 745 support
Nasdaq Futures: 26376 (-1.15%) testing 26300 technical floor
Dow Jones Futures: 52000 (+0.64%) breaking above 51800 resistance on bank strength

sections.heading: 🎯 TOP MOVERS
sections.content:
AMD: $507.29 (-7.30%) — semiconductor weakness pressuring sector — critical support at $500
JPM: $331.14 (+3.68%) — financials outperforming on rate expectations — targeting $335
NVDA: $207.41 (-2.37%) — profit-taking after recent rally — watching $205 support
META: $600.21 (+1.13%) — bucking tech selloff with ad strength — eyeing $605 breakout

sections.heading: 🏦 SECTOR THEME
sections.content:
Clear rotation from growth to value as financials surge while semiconductors crater, signaling defensive positioning ahead of Fed.
📰 CATALYSTS
Fed Decision & Warsh Remarks | 2:00 PM ET | Critical for rate trajectory and policy tone
SpaceX Valuation Surge | Ongoing | Near $3 trillion creating wealth effect questions
Tech Earnings Revisions | After-hours | Semiconductor guidance under scrutiny

sections.heading: ⚠️ RISKS
sections.content: AMD's 7% plunge signals potential semiconductor correction risk spreading across tech. Trump Iran threat headlines adding geopolitical uncertainty while VIX remains subdued at 16.34, potentially underpricing event risk.

quote:
🌅 SNAPSHOT
Futures diverge as tech weakens ahead of Fed decision while financials rally, creating sector rotation into value
conclusion: AMD's 7% plunge signals potential semiconductor correction risk spreading across tech. Trump Iran threat headlines adding geopolitical uncertainty while VIX remains subdued at 16.34, potentially underpricing event risk.
